summary: This document outlines psychological principles and engagement techniques for designing an AI conversational agent focused on mental health and care. It details specific strategies like open-ended questioning, active listening, and ethical boundaries regarding diagnosis and crisis intervention. The notes also suggest the need for professional oversight and accessibility in the user experience.
